personalInfo.name: Avjeet Singh
personalInfo.title: Multiplatform Mobile Architect | Android Engineer
personalInfo.description: 6+ years building Android, KMP & CMP applications. GSoC Mentor, Hackathon Winner.

description: Leveraged Kotlin & Compose Multiplatform to build cross-platform features for Desktop and iOS apps, accelerating desktop POS platform support by migrating from an Android-native mono repo to a unified multiplatform architecture.

Customized the open-source Jitsi React Web App to enable remote control support on Android without extra permissions; developed a Jitsi-based Android client and SDK (Pinpoint AI Agent Debugger Tool) that integrates with any app, providing remote control and logging functionality — won Pincode Hackathon 2025.
Delivered secure workforce management features including check-in/out flows, background geofencing, and spoofing detection.

Led staff management module design integrating role-based access, onboarding workflows, and contact synchronization, enabling store owners to manage 10,000+ staff members efficiently and improving operational productivity by 30%.
Developed QR code generation & printing feature by building a dynamic form-driven QR label generator with in-app printing support.
Developed a self-onboarding flow for stores, reducing onboarding time by 40% and increasing store listings on the platform by 25% within the first 3 months of launch.
Assembled and mentored a high-performing team of 8 Android engineers to develop an app that achieved 50M+ downloads, surpassing industry standards with a crash rate of only 0.2%.

Transformed user experience by innovating the video playback module — merging live game streaming, playback features, pre-roll ads, and live chat capabilities using sockets — resulting in a 30% increase in user engagement and ad revenue.

Implemented a robust monetization strategy by integrating Google Ad SDK, custom brand affiliations, and an e-commerce marketplace with a secure payment gateway, generating a revenue stream surpassing millions of dollars.
Spearheaded the development of Rooter Reels, driving a 40% surge in average user engagement with short video content and amplifying media consumption in new users funnel to 90%.
Innovated the Rooter Tasks, Rewards and Coupons feature, introducing user economy and facilitating brand integrations that enhanced user stickiness.
Conceptualized and deployed a diverse suite of user-generated content tools for videos, images, and polls, resulting in a 50% surge in post creation by new users.
Crafted a mobile app roadmap enabling the development team to launch 2-3 new releases every month with major updates.
Worked on the Android app for the open-source platform Pocket Science Lab, designing and implementing user-friendly, intuitive app interfaces in collaboration with designers and product managers.
Created robust APIs with RESTful services to integrate mobile apps and backend systems.
Authored weekly blog posts reaching an audience of 20K+ readers on FOSSASIA's website.
Later returned as GSoC Mentor (2019-2020), leading design and implementation of app interfaces and reducing development time by 35% through better API architecture.

projects.title: Pinpoint AI Agent Debugger Tool
projects.description: A Jitsi-based Android SDK that enables remote control and logging for any Android app — built and open-sourced at PhonePe; winner of Pincode Hackathon 2025.
features: Customized the open-source Jitsi React Web App to enable remote control support on Android without requiring extra permissions
Developed a drop-in Android client and SDK that integrates with any Android app, providing full remote control and session logging functionality
Won the Pincode Hackathon 2025 — deployed internally to accelerate AI agent debugging workflows across teams

projects.title: Rooter App
projects.description: India's premier gaming and esports platform — 50M+ downloads, live game streaming, short video content, and an in-app marketplace, all on a 0.2% crash rate.
features: Built a real-time video playback module merging live game streaming, pre-roll ads, and live chat via WebSockets — driving a 30% lift in user engagement
Spearheaded Rooter Reels (short video), UGC tools (videos, images, polls), and a Tasks/Rewards/Coupons economy — boosting new-user media consumption to 90%
Integrated Google Ad SDK, custom brand affiliations, and a secure e-commerce payment gateway generating millions in revenue; maintained a 0.2% crash rate across 50M+ installs

projects.title: Pocket Science Lab
projects.description: FOSSASIA's open-source hardware science lab companion app for Android — contributed as a Google Summer of Code intern in 2018.
features: Designed and implemented user-friendly app interfaces for the Pocket Science Lab hardware platform in collaboration with designers and product managers
Built RESTful API integrations connecting the Android app with backend lab data systems
Authored weekly development blog posts that reached 20K+ readers on FOSSASIA's platform, documenting progress and promoting open-source contribution

education.institution: Guru Gobind Singh Indraprastha University, Delhi
education.degree: Bachelor of Technology, Computer Science & Engineering

education.institution: Guru Nanak Public School, Punjabi Bagh

achievements.title: Pincode Hackathon 2025 Winner
achievements.description: Built Pinpoint AI Agent Debugger Tool — a Jitsi-based Android SDK enabling remote control and logging for any Android app.

achievements.title: Smart India Hackathon Winner
achievements.description: Won Smart India Hackathon 2018 — India's largest hackathon organized by MHRD. Team 'The Aimers' secured ₹75,000 prize at the Grand Finale.

achievements.title: Google Summer of Code Mentor
achievements.description: Mentored GSoC contributors on the Pocket Science Lab Android app at FOSSASIA. Previously participated as a GSoC intern in 2018.

achievements.title: FOSSASIA JugaadFest Speaker
achievements.description: Spoke and mentored participants at JugaadFest by FOSSASIA — an open-source and tech innovation event held in India.

interests: Passionate about building high-quality mobile experiences, cross-platform architecture with KMP/CMP, open source contribution, and mentoring the next generation of developers.
